_comment: This is the engine's memory of what to write next. It reads the first item with status 'pending' (skipping 'hold'). Add topics any time, or ask the engine to suggest a batch. The two topics below are WORKED EXAMPLES for a fictional espresso blog: delete them and add your own.

categories._comment: Only needed for WordPress (cms) mode. Map your archetype types to your real WordPress category IDs. In document mode you can ignore this.

topics.title: How to choose your first espresso machine
topics.note: Pillar-style beginner guide. Link later posts up to this one.

topics.title: Manual vs automatic espresso machines: which should you buy?
topics.note: Interlink with the first-machine guide; do not overlap its 'types' section.

topics.title: Best espresso machines under 500
topics.note: HOLD example: only write once the two pillars above are live so this can link up to them.

_field_help.type: one of the archetypes in references/writing-engine.md (guide, comparison, listicle, faq, opinion, review, pillar)
_field_help.keyword: the single focus keyphrase for this URL
_field_help.output_file: set by the engine after writing, e.g. how-to-choose-your-first-espresso-machine.md
_field_help.seo_title / seo_desc: set by the engine; used by the WordPress publisher
_field_help.category_id: WordPress only; overrides the categories map above for this topic
